## Summary

- Describe the user-facing change.

## Why

Explain the problem or opportunity this addresses.

## Compatibility and security

- [ ] Existing `anvil` configurations remain supported.
- [ ] No credentials, private transcripts, or audio are present in the change.
- [ ] Configuration or compatibility changes are documented.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:docs`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:package`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
